name: Global Water Resources, Inc.
summary: Global Water Resources, Inc. (GWRS) is a water resource management company operating regulated water, wastewater, and recycled water utilities exclusively in Arizona. The company owns and operates multiple utility subsidiaries including GW-Santa Cruz, GW-Palo Verde, GW-Farmers, GW-Hassayampa, GW-Belmont, GW-Turner, GW-Saguaro, and GW-Ocotillo, providing water and wastewater services primarily concentrated within a single municipality in Arizona, with operations subject to regulation by the Arizona Corporation Commission (ACC).

products.name: Water Distribution Service
products.description: Regulated potable water supply and distribution to residential and commercial customers in Arizona.

products.name: Wastewater Collection and Treatment
products.description: Regulated wastewater collection, treatment, and disposal services including the Southwest Plant facility.

products.name: Recycled Water Service
products.description: Recycled water services provided as part of integrated water resource management operations.

products.name: Automated Meter Infrastructure (AMI)
products.description: Automated meter infrastructure technology deployed across utility service areas.

products.name: Water Distribution Service
products.description: Regulated potable water supply and distribution to residential and commercial customers in Arizona service areas.

products.name: Wastewater Treatment Service
products.description: Regulated wastewater collection and treatment services including the Southwest Plant facility in Pinal County.

products.name: Recycled Water Service
products.description: Recycled water utility services provided through regulated subsidiaries in Arizona.

products.name: Automated Meter Infrastructure (AMI)
products.description: Automated meter infrastructure technology deployed for utility monitoring and management.

partnerships.description: Revolving credit facility (Revolver) provided by The Northern Trust Company, an Illinois banking corporation.
